temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, grimy room with tiled walls, a man in a light-colored suit gestures authoritatively. He is surrounded by several menacing men dressed in black, who stand silently behind him. The man in the suit points towards the camera, giving an order. (Storyline: This opening scene establishes a tense confrontation. A man of authority is asserting control over a group of intimidating henchmen, setting a menacing tone for the events to follow.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Authoritative, commanding. 2) Background sounds or music: A tense, rhythmic, and percussive musical score begins, building suspense.)
(00:04-00:09) Following the order, the men in black suits begin to rummage through their pockets and jackets, pulling out their smartphones. The man in the suit watches them with a stern expression as they comply. (Storyline: The henchmen's compliance with the order confirms their subordinate role and the seriousness of the situation. The act of surrendering their phones is a clear sign of submission to the man in charge.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral, slightly dismissive. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, percussive music continues.)
